text.title: Serverless Architecture Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the workload pattern compatible with serverless prerequisites?

text.example: Workload: image-thumbnailer triggered by S3 events. Step 1: async event. Step 2: shortlist S3+Lambda fan-out, Step Functions. Step 3: 50k uploads/day cheap on Lambda; break-even 200 RPS, comfortably below. Step 4: latency 2s acceptable. Step 5: dedup by S3 object version; OTel tracing. Step 6: SAM template. ADR-SLS-007 Accepted, review trigger = upload RPS > 200.
